summary: Phase 1.5 model artifact publisher: serializes all three trainers to joblib with metadata.json, promotion gate, metrics copy, and golden-fixture smoke tests.

criticalFindings.description: Promotion thresholds in thresholds.py are provisional until #142 Product sign-off. — Rationale: Gate logic is in place; numeric targets will be finalized in system-design.md via #142.

interfaceChanges.description: Serialize model.joblib, metadata.json, and copy metrics.json under models/{suite}/{version}/.
Load joblib model and metadata for a suite/version.
Load artifact and run golden fixture inference; raises ArtifactLoadError on failure.
Return promoted or experimental based on provisional backtest thresholds.

mappings.criterion: Directory layout matches system-design.md model.joblib and metadata.json
metadata.json includes train_date row_count feature_schema_hash metrics promotion_status
publish_model load_model load and infer on golden fixture in smoke test
Corrupt model file fails smoke test with clear error
Sub-threshold run serializes as experimental only not promoted
Metrics JSON written alongside model file during publish

findings.description: Promotion thresholds in thresholds.py are provisional until #142 Product sign-off. — Rationale: Gate logic is in place; numeric targets will be finalized in system-design.md via #142.
